sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52793" key="kalo/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλό-βῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52793.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living decorously</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">N.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
